notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: George Springer reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Corey Seager. Andrés Giménez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: George Springer reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Corey Seager. Andrés Giménez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue walks. Brandon Nimmo to 3rd. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna grounds into a double play, first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to catcher Alejandro Kirk to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ezequiel Duran out at home. Alejandro Osuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna grounds into a double play, first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to catcher Alejandro Kirk to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ezequiel Duran out at home. Alejandro Osuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ernie Clement. Corey Seager to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Louis Varland. Jarred Kelenic scores.

notableEvents.label: George Springer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Andrés Giménez out at 2nd. George Springer out at 1st.
